summary: Placeholder review lane added during generation-system hardening. Safety coverage exists but remains incomplete for event-level adverse-event extraction and durability assessment.

findings.claim_or_issue: Safety records are mostly triage-level, with aggregate D+Q bone RCT adverse-event counts but no event-specific safety schema or complete safety extraction across human studies.
findings.why_it_matters: Safety synthesis requires event-specific counts, severity, discontinuation, dosing cadence, and follow-up context.
findings.recommended_action: Add event-specific safety records or an adverse-event schema, then run safety extraction across DKD, IPF, bone, and AD-risk human studies.
